description: Grafana provides observability software and services for dashboards, metrics, logs, traces, profiling, alerting, and incident response, including managed Grafana Cloud and self-hosted Grafana. Its products let teams collect, query, visualize, and operate on telemetry and related operational data.
summary: Grafana exposes two developer HTTP APIs—a tenant/instance Grafana HTTP API and the grafana.com Grafana Cloud API—and a Grafana MCP server; auth is via service account tokens, Cloud Access Policy tokens, or on-prem Basic auth for the instance HTTP API/MCP server.
